title: Vežba 112

questions.text:
Nakon što je razgovarala o rizicima sa Brajonom, Anna je odlučila da obavesti tim o sprečavanju MiTM napada, posebno tokom poslovnih putovanja:

Dear Team,

As the summit is near and many of you will be traveling for work, it's important to stay safe online. Man-in-the-Middle attacks (MitM) often happen on public Wi-Fi or unsecured networks, especially during peak travel times. These attacks can steal your data, including corporate emails and sensitive information.

To stay protected, always use a VPN (Virtual Private Network) when accessing sensitive information or company systems. Avoid using public Wi-Fi for important tasks. Check the updated security tips and job aids we've shared. They include simple steps to keep your data safe while traveling.

We've scheduled a security review meeting to share more advice and discuss security protocols. If you have any questions or need help setting up your VPN, contact the security team before your trip.

Stay safe, Your Security Team

Šta pismo kaže o ažuriranim sigurnosnim napomenama?

answers.answer: Mora se uzeti u obzir tokom sastanka inspekcije bezbednosti.
answers.feedback: E-mail ne govori o ažuriranim savetima za bezbednost vezanim za sastanak, već preporučuje proveru pre putovanja.

answers.answer: Moraju se koristiti samo za e-mailove kompanije.
answers.feedback: E-pošta spominje šire sigurnosne metode, nije samo o e-mailu.

answers.answer: To je opciono i može se proveriti kasnije.
answers.feedback: Email pokazuje važnost provere ažuriranih dokumenata pre putovanja.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.
explanation:
Da biste dobili tačan odgovor, obratite pažnju na deo mejla koji govori o ažuriranim sigurnosnim nalepstvima (savetima).

Ovi smernice pomažu zaposlenima da zaštite osetljive informacije pružajući praktične korake za sigurno online korišćenje.

E-mail predlaže da se ove napomene provere pre putovanja. Potražite odgovor koji to objašnjava.
